# Type

**Data field**

An unsigned 32-bit field.

## Overview

Contains the four-character-code `'avcC'`.

## Data fields

- **Size**: An unsigned 32-bit integer holding the size of the AVC decoder configuration atom.
- **AVC decoder configuration record**: A record that configures the AVC decoder.
